LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeBabyFood.description: Make baby food, a nutritionally balanced vegetarian mash for babies. While easy to make in large quantities, only babies appreciate its bland taste and mushy texture.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeBabyFood.label: make baby food
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeKibble.description: Make animal kibble by combining raw meat and plants. 24 kibble will be produced per every nutrition consumed, so 15 vegetable and 15 meat will output 36 kibble.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeKibble.label: make kibble
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeKibbleFromHay.description: Make animal kibble by combining raw meat and hay. Will always output 36 kibble.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeKibbleFromHay.label: make kibble from hay
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeMassProducedMeal.descript: Cook straightforward, mass-produced meals from a combination of meat and plant ingredients. A total of 2 nutrition will make 4 mass-produced meals.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeMassProducedMeal.label: make mass-produced meals
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakePemmican.description: Make pemmican, a preserved combination of meat and plant food. It doesn't taste amazing, but lasts a long time without refrigeration. 32 pemmican will be produced per every nutrition consumed, so 5 vegetable and 5 meat will output 16 pemmican.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakePemmican.label: make pemmican
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakePumpkinCoffee.description: Make pumpkin spice coffee, a cheap, mass produced generic coffee seeped in an array of spices, oddly excluding any actual pumpkin..
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakePumpkinCoffee.label: make pumpkin spice coffee
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeSimpleSoup.description: Prepare a simple uncooked soup quickly made from a few ingredients.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeSimpleSoup.label: prepare simple soup
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeSurvivalMeal.description: Prepare packaged survival meals from a combination of meat and plant ingredients. Much of the ingredients are wasted in the preservation process. A total of 2.4 nutrition will make 4 survival meals.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeSurvivalMeal.label: make survival meal
